data.name: Heroes Saga
data.detailed_description:
Add our new game to your wishlist!


關於此遊戲

Welcome to Atris - a world of magic and intrigue, where outsiders are summoned through a mysterious ritual and called Heroes. But who are these Heroes, really? And what are they needed for? You’ll have to find out for yourself… if you survive.

Synopsis:

You play as an ordinary guy who, by chance, finds himself in this world, on the continent of Valarion. The locals mistake him for a newly summoned Hero, and every powerful figure seeks to use him for their own ends. To survive, he must adapt - making tough choices, trusting, deceiving, fighting, and winning! But remember: in this world, Heroes are merely tools. Those who become unwanted... quickly disappear.

Well-developed, Living World.

Valarion stands on the brink of change: humans rapidly expand their domains, elves are split into two factions, dwarves barricade themselves in their mountains and avoid conflict, beastfolk tribes are driven to the fringes, and demons lurk in the shadows. In the human kingdom of Xanthria, passions run high - intrigues, power struggles, and endless feuds. To consolidate his rule, the king opens a portal and summons Heroes from other worlds....

Beautiful ladies with their own goals

Your journey will bring not only battles but also unforgettable encounters. Every woman is a complex individual - with her own personality, secrets, and hidden motives. Build relationships, uncover their mysteries, and win their hearts. But beware: not all of them wish you well.

The Choice is Yours.

Your decisions shape not only your relationships with characters but the very course of the story. Who will you trust? Who will you betray? Who will you share a night with - and who will you stab in the back?

Fight and Play.

Beyond choices, the game features a turn-based combat system that grows more challenging as the story progresses. Mini-games are also included to add variety to your experience.

Game Features

  • A detailed, living world filled with conflicts and mysteries.

  • Challenging (and not-so-challenging) choices that shape your story.

  • Romantic storylines with captivating ladies.

  • Numerous erotic and sexual scenes, presented through animated sequences and illustrations.

  • High-quality artwork.

  • Turn-based combat and mini-games.

Good luck on your adventure, "Hero". Don’t anger the Demoness!

data.short_description: You've lost everything and found yourself in a world where a smile can become a deadly trap. "Heroes Saga" is a fantasy visual novel about choice, power, and temptation. Are you the hunter or the prey?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
